recommendations.title: The Legend Is Born: Ip Man

recommendations.title: The Untold Story
recommendations.overview: Macau cops begin to suspect a man running a pork buns restaurant of murder, after tracing the origin of a case full of chopped up human remains that washed ashore, which leads them to him.

recommendations.title: Shock Wave
recommendations.overview: When a terrorist who specializes in explosives takes hold of an underground tunnel, he threatens to kill hostages if his demands are not met.

recommendations.title: Shock Wave 2

recommendations.title: Ebola Syndrome
recommendations.overview: A violent fugitive on the run from the law makes his way from Hong Kong to South Africa, where he discovers that he's immune to the Ebola virus, and later returns home to spread the deadly disease.

recommendations.title: Ip Man 2

recommendations.title: Kung Fury
recommendations.overview: During an unfortunate series of events, a friend of Kung Fury is assassinated by the most dangerous kung fu master criminal of all time, Adolf Hitler, a.k.a Kung Führer.  Kung Fury decides to travel back in time to Nazi Germany in order to kill Hitle

recommendations.title: Ip Man 4: The Finale
recommendations.overview: Following the death of his wife, Ip Man travels to San Francisco to ease tensions between the local kung fu masters and his star student, Bruce Lee, while searching for a better future for his son.

recommendations.title: Ip Man
recommendations.overview: A semi-biographical account of Yip Man, the first martial arts master to teach the Chinese martial art of Wing Chun. The film focuses on events surrounding Ip that took place in the city of Foshan between the 1930s to 1940s during the Second Sino-Jap
